steps: KEYWORD DETECT: S1 'pani bhar gaya'->urban_flood(7) | S2 'flooding'->urban_flood(7) | S3 'sarak band'+pani; highest sev wins->urban_flood(7) | S4 weather corroboration | S5 traffic corroboration
MENTION VELOCITY [G-10/urban_flood social]: S1,S2,S3 all in 2-min window. count=3, boost=min(0.30,(3-1)x0.10)=0.20
FORMULA v2 [social]: credibility=(base+boost)x freshness. S1:(0.35+0.20)x1.0=0.55 | S2:0.55 | S3:0.55
FORMULA v2 [non-social]: credibility=base x freshness. S4:0.90x1.0=0.90 | S5:0.80x1.0=0.80

cascade_effects: Electrical hazard risk in flooded zones

steps: PRIORITY: ISB-001 pop_density(G-10)=8, dist=0km, resp_time=0min. score=8x8/(1+0)=64.0
ALLOCATE ISB-001: ambulances=2, rescue_teams=2, police_units=3, medical_vans=1
POOL REMAINING: ambulances=2, rescue_teams=1, police_units=2, medical_vans=1

actions.description: Dispatch 2 ambulances to G-10 flood zone via Kashmir Highway
actions.state_change: Two ambulance icons animate from base toward G-10/2; route line renders red on map

actions.description: Deploy 2 rescue teams to G-10/2 for water rescue and evacuation
actions.state_change: Rescue team markers appear at G-10/2; orange pulse expands to 2.5km radius

actions.description: Deploy 3 police units to Srinagar Highway / G-10 interchange for diversion
actions.state_change: Police icons at G-10 interchange; Srinagar Highway turns red; IJP Road highlighted green

actions.description: Send targeted public alert to all residents within 2.5km of G-10 centroid
actions.state_change: Alert pulse radiates from G-10; 2.5km zone shaded amber; notification badge increments

actions.description: Notify PIMS Hospital to prepare 8 trauma beds; ETA 5 min
actions.state_change: PIMS icon flashes yellow; ER widget shows 'Trauma Alert — 8 beds reserved'

actions.description: Dispatch 1 medical van to G-10 entry for field triage
actions.state_change: Medical van icon moves depot->G-10 boundary; 'Field Triage Active' flag appears

stakeholder_messages.public_english: Emergency alert: Severe urban_flood in G-10. Avoid Srinagar Highway. Use IJP Road as alternate. Stay safe.
stakeholder_messages.public_urdu: ہنگامی الرٹ: G-10 میں شدید شہری سیلاب۔ سری نگر ہائی وے سے پرہیز کریں۔ متبادل راستہ آئی جے پی روڈ استعمال کریں۔
stakeholder_messages.pims_hospital: Mass casualty alert: urban_flood G-10. Prepare 8 trauma beds. ETA of first ambulance: 5 min.
stakeholder_messages.traffic_authority: Incident Command: Block Srinagar Highway at G-10 Interchange. Redirect to IJP Road immediately.
stakeholder_messages.iesco_utility: Safety alert: urban_flood in G-10. Risk of electrical hazard. Dispatch crew to assess G-10 sector.
stakeholder_messages.media_command: Incident ID #ISB-001. Type: urban_flood. Severity: 8/10. Confidence: 0.90. Resources deployed: 2 ambulances, 2 rescue_teams, 3 police_units, 1 medical_van.

pending_alerts: Public SMS alert dispatched — G-10 2.5km radius
PIMS Hospital ER trauma alert sent
